{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322053444022961C30DFFE27B7DBF\"}"},"total":2929},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6987325405992878882","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看的很有感觉，二十几年老书虫了，能看进去的书，作者都是用了心码字，逻辑通顺，文字流畅，喜欢看这种风格小说的可以放心进坑了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626863475,"group_id":"6971402436577594375","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N30Of1zWmpDZQl1D2ZYfjJc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/940f5c1ce63242e680266e826cb5f929~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776706811\u0026x-signature=ZuF2zwtF0gM%2Fo3wRXuDdA43csok%3D","user_id":"51508770839","user_name":"未设置密码"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51508770839","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775210787,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"svip\",\"title_id\":\"svip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6971402436577594375","book_info":{"abstract":"每个人的生命中多多少少都会有一些遗憾，我们在懊恼、后悔的同时，如果真的能够重生回到过去，你是否能够抓住时机扭转自己的命运？如果你还没想好，不妨先看一下主角的故事：一个破产科技公司的老板——江飞宇，因意外死亡，灵魂从2021年重生回到2001年，让我们看看比别人多了20年时代发展经历的他，会给这个时代带来怎样翻天覆地的变化！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/cb65b763455e7d3363316534201687f1","author":"玄舞阳","author_id":"","book_id":"6971402436577594375","book_name":"重生我的大学时代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#106088","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263\u0026name=都市种田\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36\u0026name=重生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":840,\"name\":\"发家致富\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840\u0026name=发家致富\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6976168947355746823","read_count":"29908","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4504408"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"2001","tags":"都市种田,都市,重生,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/612ab0e0e4c08595c5c07c36138b26e7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779312884\u0026x-signature=L7fglsNGAOOGQbbwyaHCnNPOjRY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"82389940815","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"25"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322053444022961C30DFFE27B7DBF\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score"
